id.description: kebab-case unique id; defaults to slug of name

flavor.description: one-line evocative summary of the armor's look/feel/circus theme

category.description: 5e armor category. light = baseAC + full Dex; medium = baseAC + Dex (capped by maxDexBonus, usually 2); heavy = baseAC only, no Dex; shield = a flat acBonus added on top of worn armor.

baseAC.description: Base Armor Class before Dexterity, for body armor (light/medium/heavy). Omit for shields (use acBonus instead).

maxDexBonus.description: Dexterity cap added to baseAC. null = no cap (light armor adds full Dex mod); 2 = medium armor; 0 = heavy armor (no Dex). Omit for shields.

acBonus.description: Shields only: the flat AC bonus a shield adds (e.g. 2). Omit for body armor.

strengthRequirement.description: Minimum Strength score to wear without a speed penalty; omit if none. Heavy armors are typically 13-15.

stealthDisadvantage.description: true if wearing this armor imposes disadvantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.
